signals.headline: Ripple's XRPL Quantum-Resistant Roadmap Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple's XRPL Quantum-Resistant Roadmap Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ripple unveiled a detailed four-phase roadmap on April 20, 2026, to make the XRP Ledger quantum-ready by 2028, with Phase 3 testing hybrid signatures in H2 2026, positioning XRPL ahead of Bitcoin and Ethereum.[1][4] This proactive announcement addresses quantum computing threats to cryptography, potentially boosting XRP
